title: About Us
content:
We are a leading business law firm in Canada. Excellence, collaboration, inclusion and innovation are the pillars on which we deliver business legal solutions.

### We deliver strategic and innovative legal and business solutions for our clients, wherever their business takes them.
McCarthy Tétrault is Canada’s premier, full-service law firm, offering a comprehensive range of legal and business solutions to Canadian and international clients. Our 800-plus lawyers deliver integrated business, litigation, tax, real property, and labour and employment law services through our offices in the major Canadian business centres of Vancouver, Calgary, Toronto, Montréal, Québec City, as well as New York City and London, UK.
Clients are always our top priority. Our industry expertise and cross-practice, collaborative platform ensure we help build our clients’ competitive advantage. No matter where our clients do business around the world, we are dedicated to providing borderless client service to support their goals.
We became the first national Canadian law firm in 1989 with our then unprecedented expansion to multiple provinces. We are also Canada’s most innovative law firm, leading the way in reimagining legal service delivery through our client solutions and our MT>Divisions , which stand ready to meet our clients’ evolving needs.
Our firm-wide commitment to diversity and inclusion ensures that we have creative and innovative lawyers whose wide range of views can help our clients seize opportunities and overcome challenges. McCarthy Tétrault is dedicated to combining top talent with industry insight and practice experience to help clients achieve their objectives. We have evolved beyond the traditional boundaries of law to deliver services that work for our clients today and tomorrow.
Our firm values support our mission and enable our clients to achieve their business objectives. These values are intrinsic to who we are as a law firm and as a member of the global business community:
- Clients are at the centre of everything we do.
- Our people are our greatest asset.
- Our firm culture is built on professional excellence, collaboration, innovation, thought leadership, and entrepreneurialism.
- Inclusion in all its forms is embraced, and we help our people develop to their full potential.
At McCarthy Tétrault, we pride ourselves on a tradition of legal excellence that has shaped the business and legal landscape in Canada. We continue to lead innovation to meet the evolving needs of clients and deliver services more efficiently than ever.
